data.body: STEP 7 RESULT: 7 BLOCK / 10 PASS / 3 INDETERMINATE (5 'PARSE_ERROR' were my wrapper rejecting control chars; recovered from sidecars). User approved 0.70 threshold. ROOT CAUSE of 3 INDETERMINATE = agentic Pass-2 verifier (plan-review-verifier-agentic) exceeded 50-step budget; error misclassified as llm_unavailable in gate_dispatch broad fall-through -> hollow INDETERMINATE discards Pass-1 findings + blocks claim (fail-closed, contra gate's fail-open design). Filed bug 59bc-b9ba-021a-435f (discovered_from 3d3d). NOT caused by threshold change; pre-existing.
